instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul and Timothy, slaves of Christ Jesus, to all the saints in Christ Jesus who are in Philippi, with the overseers and deacons:
output: Pablo y Timoteo, esclavos de Cristo Jesús, a todos los santos en Cristo Jesús que están en Filipos, con los que vigilan y los diáconos:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I thank my God upon all my remembrance of you,
output: Doy gracias a mi Dios siempre que me acuerdo de vosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Always in my every petition on behalf of you all, making my petition with joy,
output: siempre en todas mis peticiones orando con gozo por todos vosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For your fellowship unto the furtherance of the gospel from the first day until now,
output: por vuestra comunión en el progreso del evangelio, desde el primer día hasta ahora;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being confident of this very thing, that He who has begun in you a good work will complete it until the day of Christ Jesus;
output: confiando en esto, que el que comenzó en vosotros una buena obra, la perfeccionará hasta el día de Cristo Jesús;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as it is right for me to think this concerning you all because you have me in your heart, since both in my bonds and in the defense and confirmation of the gospel you are all fellow partakers with me of grace.
output: como me es justo pensar esto de todos vosotros, por cuanto me tenéis en el corazón; pues tanto en mis prisiones como en la defensa y confirmación del evangelio, todos vosotros sois participantes conmigo de la gracia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For God is my witness how I long after you all in the inward parts of Christ Jesus.
output: Porque Dios me es testigo de cómo os añoro a todos vosotros en las partes internas de Cristo Jesús.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And this I pray, that your love may abound yet more and more in full knowledge and all discernment,
output: Y esto pido en oración, que vuestro amor abunde aún más y más en pleno conocimiento y en todo discernimiento,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So that you may approve by testing the things which differ and are more excellent, that you may be pure and without offense unto the day of Christ,
output: para que pongáis a prueba y aprobéis las cosas que difieren por su excelencia, a fin de que seáis puros y sin ofensa para el día de Cristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being filled with the fruit of righteousness, which is through Jesus Christ, to the glory and praise of God.
output: llenos del fruto de justicia, que es por medio de Jesucristo, para gloria y alabanza de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Now I want you to know, brothers, that the things concerning me have turned out rather to the advancement of the gospel,
output: Ahora bien, quiero que sepáis, hermanos, que las cosas que me han sucedido, han redundado más bien en el avance del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So that my bonds have become manifest as being in Christ among the whole Praetorian guard and to all the rest.
output: de tal manera que se ha hecho patente en toda la guardia pretoriana y a todos los demás, que me hallo en cadenas por Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And most of the brothers, being confident in the Lord because of my bonds, are more exceedingly bold to speak the word of God without fear.
output: Y la mayoría de los hermanos, con confianza en el Señor por mis prisiones, se atreven mucho más a hablar la palabra de Dios sin temor.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Some preach Christ even because of envy and strife, and some also because of good will,
output: Algunos predican a Cristo por envidia y contienda; pero otros de buena voluntad;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These out of love, knowing that I am set for the defense of the gospel.
output: éstos lo hacen por amor, sabiendo que estoy puesto para la defensa del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But the others announce Christ out of selfish ambition, not purely, thinking to raise up affliction in my bonds.
output: pero aquéllos anuncian a Cristo por ambición egoísta, no con intenciones puras, pensando añadir aflicción a mis prisiones.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: What then? Only that in every way, whether in pretense or in truthfulness, Christ is announced; and in this I rejoice; yes, and I will rejoice;
output: ¿Qué, pues? Que no obstante, de todas maneras, o por pretexto o con veracidad, Cristo es anunciado; y en esto me gozo; sí, me gozaré aún.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For I know that for me this will turn out to salvation through your petition and the bountiful supply of the Spirit of Jesus Christ,
output: Porque sé que por vuestra petición y la abundante suministración del Espíritu de Jesucristo, esto resultará en mi salvación,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: According to my earnest expectation and hope that in nothing I will be put to shame, but with all boldness, as always, even now Christ will be magnified in my body, whether through life or through death.
output: conforme a mi anhelo y esperanza de que en nada seré avergonzado; antes bien con toda confianza, como siempre, ahora también será magnificado Cristo en mi cuerpo, o por vida o por muerte.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For to me, to live is Christ and to die is gain.
output: Porque para mí el vivir es Cristo, y el morir es ganancia.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But if I am to live in the flesh, if this to me is fruit for my work, then I do not know what I will choose.
output: Mas si el vivir en la carne resulta para mí en una labor fructífera, no sé entonces qué escogeré.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But I am constrained between the two, having the desire to depart and be with Christ, for this is far better;
output: Porque de ambas cosas estoy puesto en estrecho, teniendo deseo de partir y estar con Cristo, pues esto es muchísimo mejor;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But to remain in the flesh is more necessary for your sake.
output: pero quedar en la carne es más necesario por causa de vosotros.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And being confident of this, I know that I will remain and continue with you all for your progress and joy of the faith,
output: Y confiando en esto, sé que quedaré, y aún permaneceré con todos vosotros, para vuestro progreso y gozo de la fe,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That your boast may abound in Christ Jesus in me through my coming again to you.
output: para que abunde vuestra gloria de mí en Cristo Jesús con mi venida otra vez a vosotros.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Only, conduct yourselves in a manner worthy of the gospel of Christ, that whether coming and seeing you or being absent, I may hear of the things concerning you, that you stand firm in one spirit, with one soul striving together along with the faith of the gospel,
output: Solamente que os comportéis como es digno del evangelio de Cristo, para que o sea que vaya a veros, o que esté ausente, oiga de vosotros que estáis firmes en un mismo espíritu, combatiendo unánimes junto con la fe del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in nothing being frightened by the opposers, which is to them a proof of their destruction, but of your salvation, and that from God;
output: y en nada intimidados por los que se oponen, que para ellos ciertamente es indicio de destrucción, mas para vosotros de salvación; y esto de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because to you it has been graciously granted on behalf of Christ not only to believe into Him but also to suffer on His behalf,
output: Porque a vosotros os es concedido a causa de Cristo, no sólo que creáis *en Él, sino también que padezcáis por Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Having the same struggle which you saw in me and now hear to be in me.
output: teniendo el mismo conflicto que habéis visto en mí, y ahora oís que hay en mí.
